zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy Fitzpeter於1207年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾韋斯特 迪恩時，她的父親Sir Piers FitzHerbert45歲，母親Alice FitzRobert22歲。她於1225年與Sir William de Ros of Helmsley在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1264年9月29日在英國越可爾享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy Fitzpeter于1207年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾韋斯特 迪恩时，她的父亲Sir Piers FitzHerbert45岁，母亲Alice FitzRobert22岁。她于1225年与Sir William de Ros of Helmsley在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1264年9月29日在英国越可爾享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy Fitzpeter was born in 1207, in West Dean, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Piers FitzHerbert, was 45 and her mother, Alice FitzRobert, was 22. She married Sir William de Ros of Helmsley in 1225, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 29 September 1264, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy Fitzpeter est née en 1207, à West Dean, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Piers FitzHerbert, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Alice FitzRobert, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Ros of Helmsley en 1225, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 septembre 1264, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy Fitzpeter 1207 in West Dean, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Piers FitzHerbert 45 und ihre Mutter Alice FitzRobert 22. Sie hat 1225 in Yorkshire, England Sir William de Ros of Helmsley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. September 1264 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

Lei sposato Sir William de Ros of Helmsley nel 1225, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 settembre 1264, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy Fitzpeterが1207年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウエスト ディーンで生まれた時，父Sir Piers FitzHerbertは45歳，母Alice FitzRobertは22歳であった。1225年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir William de Ros of Helmsleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1264年9月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Fitzpeter(이)가 1207년 영국 그루스스터실르 웨스트 디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Piers FitzHerbert(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice FitzRobert(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1225년 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir William de Ros of Helmsley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1264년 9월 29일 영국 요르크실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Fitzpeter nasceu em 1207, em West Dean, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Piers FitzHerbert, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzRobert, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Ros of Helmsley em 1225, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1264, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy Fitzpeter родилась в 1207 г. в местности вест дин, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Piers FitzHerbert было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzRobert, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Ros of Helmsley в 1225 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 29 сентября 1264 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy Fitzpeter nació en 1207, en West Dean, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Piers FitzHerbert, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Alice FitzRobert, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir William de Ros of Helmsley en 1225, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1264, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
